special_mechanics.name: Flying Mech Piloting
special_mechanics.description: Player directly pilots a flying, transforming mech with variable fighter characteristics. Multi-role vehicle for combat and utility.

physics_values.fuel_system: Both mech and ground forces have finite fuel affecting engagement duration

special_mechanics.name: Airlift Mechanics
special_mechanics.description: Mech airlifts ground combat units across battlefield. Command activities (mission reassignment, vehicle repair) only performable through mech.

tier_notes: Herzog Zwei is a real-time strategy game, not a platformer. Available sources focus on gameplay mechanics, strategy elements, and reception rather than precise movement physics parameters. Movement parameters (walk speed, jump velocity, gravity, etc.) are not applicable to this game's core mechanics as it involves piloting a flying mech in a strategic context rather than character-based platforming.
